subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! These are the days wherein all must be enkindled with the fire of the love of the All-Merciful and arise in assistance of the Cause of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ا ح م د این ایامیست که باید کل بنار محبت رحمن مشتعل شده بنصرت حق مشغول شوند و نصرت
subcodes.subjects: @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
